meta.note: Product catalog data extracted from the PRD so the PRD stays narrative. The catalog GROWS over time — production starts with a small curated set (~5) and expands to hundreds; the prototype currently seeds 57. Severity 'situation' bands and 'effort' are product taxonomy, not internal scores.

categories.label: Win back at-risk
categories.description: Save accounts that are slipping or about to leave — health drops, renewals at risk, and key setups coming undone.

categories.label: Re-engage quiet
categories.description: Bring owners and admins back into the workspace after they go quiet or stop logging in.

categories.label: Drive adoption
categories.description: Get accounts to switch on and stick with the features they're paying for.

categories.label: Rescue revenue
categories.description: Protect the money — failed payments, dunning, low wallets, falling spend, and cancellation requests.

categories.label: Onboard faster
categories.description: Move new accounts to their first win before early momentum dies.

categories.label: Grow & upsell
categories.description: Act on the happy signals — heavy usage, upgrades, and surging spend — to expand the relationship.

categories.label: Listen & celebrate
categories.description: Catch feedback early and mark the milestones that build loyalty and social proof.

situations.label: Critical
situations.description: About to lose them — act today.

situations.label: Slipping
situations.description: Warning signs are showing — intervene before it gets worse.

situations.label: Steady
situations.description: Stable, but worth a light-touch nudge to keep on track.

situations.label: Strong
situations.description: Doing well — a good moment to deepen the relationship.

situations.label: Booming
situations.description: Thriving and growing fast — grow the relationship now.

playbooks.title: No recent login
playbooks.problem: The owner hasn't logged in for 21+ days.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Live account where the owner hasn't logged in for 21 days or more (excludes accounts still onboarding or already churned).

playbooks.title: Renewing soon & at risk
playbooks.problem: Renews within 30 days and showing warning signs.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Renewal coming up within the next 30 days while the account is showing warning signs.

playbooks.title: Payment failed
playbooks.problem: A recent payment failed or the card was declined.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A recent payment failed or the card was declined.

playbooks.title: Plan downgrade
playbooks.problem: The account just downgraded or dropped a paid add-on.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: The account downgraded its plan or dropped a paid add-on in the last 60 days.

playbooks.title: Usage dropping
playbooks.problem: A key feature's usage fell 30%+ this month.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Usage of a key feature has fallen sharply this month, or the account has features it's barely using.

playbooks.title: Onboarding stalled
playbooks.problem: The account has been stuck on the same setup step too long.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: The account has been stuck on the same setup step too long while still enabled.

playbooks.title: Website disconnected — win them back
playbooks.problem: Their website is no longer connected — a strong sign they're leaving.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Their website got disconnected in the last 30 days — a strong sign they're leaving.

playbooks.title: Key integration removed
playbooks.problem: A page, automation, or other key setup was removed.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A funnel, workflow, or other key setup was removed in the last 30 days.

playbooks.title: Texting registration lost — win them back
playbooks.problem: Their phone-texting registration lapsed — texts are about to stop.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Their phone-texting registration lapsed in the last 30 days — texts are about to stop.

playbooks.title: Expansion ready
playbooks.problem: Doing great, healthy, and trending up.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: An established account that's healthy and trending up.

playbooks.title: Quiet account, renewal close
playbooks.problem: Hasn't logged in lately and renews within 45 days.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Hasn't logged in for at least 14 days and renews within the next 45 days.

playbooks.title: Key feature never set up
playbooks.problem: Paying, but two or more core features were never switched on.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A paying account that never switched on two or more core features.

playbooks.title: Unhappy feedback — make it right
playbooks.problem: Left low or negative feedback recently.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Left negative or low feedback recently while still enabled.

playbooks.title: Happy customer — ask for a review
playbooks.problem: Healthy, established, and clearly happy.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: An established account that's healthy and clearly happy.

playbooks.title: Celebrate a milestone
playbooks.problem: Hit a meaningful milestone (anniversary, usage high, first result).
playbooks.defaultTrigger: The account just hit a meaningful milestone, such as a one- or two-year anniversary.

playbooks.title: Hitting plan limits
playbooks.problem: Bumping against the ceiling of their current plan.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A healthy account with 5 or more active users that's bumping against the ceiling of its current plan and isn't already on the top tier.

playbooks.title: No login — 7 days
playbooks.problem: The owner hasn't logged in for a week.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A live account where the owner hasn't logged in for 7 to 20 days.

playbooks.title: Admin gone dark — 30 days
playbooks.problem: The account admin hasn't logged in for 30+ days.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A live account where the admin hasn't logged in for 30 days or more.

playbooks.title: Whole account inactive
playbooks.problem: Every user has been idle for 30+ days — the account is going dark.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Every user has been idle for 30 days or more and the account has gone dark.

playbooks.title: Login frequency collapsed
playbooks.problem: They were logging in regularly and have suddenly dropped off.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: They were logging in regularly and have suddenly dropped off over the last 90 days.

playbooks.title: Key admin removed
playbooks.problem: An admin user was deactivated or removed from the account.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: An admin user was deactivated or removed from the account.

playbooks.title: Owner re-engaged
playbooks.problem: An account that had gone quiet is active again.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: An account that had gone quiet is logging in and active again.

playbooks.title: Health dropped to at-risk
playbooks.problem: Overall health just fell into the at-risk band.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Overall health just fell into the at-risk band.

playbooks.title: Slipped to watch
playbooks.problem: Health softened from healthy into the watch band.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Health softened from healthy into the watch band.

playbooks.title: Prolonged decline
playbooks.problem: Health has been falling steadily — a sustained downward trend.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Health has been falling steadily over a sustained period.

playbooks.title: Save the big ones
playbooks.problem: A high-MRR account is at-risk — the most expensive churn you can have.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A high-value account (MRR of $2,000 or more) is at risk.

playbooks.title: Renewing in 30 days & gone dark
playbooks.problem: Renews within 30 days and hasn't logged in for a month.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Renews within the next 30 days and hasn't logged in for a month.

playbooks.title: Annual renewal approaching
playbooks.problem: An annual account is coming up for renewal in the next 60 days.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: An annual (Pro-plan) account is coming up for renewal within the next 60 days.

playbooks.title: Website / funnel unpublished
playbooks.problem: A funnel that was live has been unpublished — a strong leaving signal.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A funnel that was live has been unpublished in the last 30 days — a strong leaving signal.

playbooks.title: Phone number ported out
playbooks.problem: They ported their phone number off the platform — one of the strongest exit signals.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: They ported their phone number off the platform in the last 30 days — one of the strongest exit signals.

playbooks.title: Email sending domain disconnected
playbooks.problem: Their email sending domain was disconnected — campaigns will stop landing.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Their email sending domain was disconnected in the last 30 days — campaigns will stop landing.

playbooks.title: Payment processor disconnected
playbooks.problem: Their Stripe/payment processor was disconnected — they can't take payments.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Their payment processor was disconnected in the last 30 days — they can't take payments.

playbooks.title: Calendar disconnected
playbooks.problem: Their calendar integration was disconnected — bookings will fail.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Their calendar integration was disconnected in the last 30 days — bookings will fail.

playbooks.title: Published workflow turned off
playbooks.problem: A live, published workflow was turned off or deleted.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A live, published workflow was turned off or deleted in the last 30 days.

playbooks.title: Payment failing repeatedly
playbooks.problem: A card has failed two or more times in a row.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A card has failed two or more times in a row.

playbooks.title: Rebilling wallet critically low
playbooks.problem: The rebilling wallet is nearly empty while usage keeps drawing it down.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: The rebilling wallet is below $250 while monthly usage is drawing it down faster than the remaining balance.

playbooks.title: Spend dropping
playbooks.problem: Their rebilling spend has fallen sharply — usage is pulling back.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Their rebilling spend has fallen sharply (down 15% or more) — usage is pulling back.

playbooks.title: Cancellation requested
playbooks.problem: They've signaled intent to cancel.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: They've signaled intent to cancel and a stop is pending.

playbooks.title: Churned — win back
playbooks.problem: An account cancelled recently.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: An account churned or cancelled in the last 90 days.

playbooks.title: No workflow 30 days after signup
playbooks.problem: A month in and they still haven't published a single automation.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Live for 30 days or more and still hasn't published a single automation.

playbooks.title: Payments never set up
playbooks.problem: A paying account never switched on payments — money they could be collecting.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A live, paying SaaS account that never switched on payments.

playbooks.title: Texting never sent
playbooks.problem: They have phone capability but haven't sent any texts.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: They have phone capability switched on but haven't sent any texts.

playbooks.title: Reviews never connected
playbooks.problem: A local-service account hasn't connected review/reputation tools.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A local-service account (such as healthcare, fitness, wellness, or legal) hasn't connected its review and reputation tools.

playbooks.title: Breadth without depth
playbooks.problem: They've touched several features but go deep on none of them.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: They've touched two or more features but use every one of them only lightly.

playbooks.title: Day-7 ghost
playbooks.problem: A new account hasn't logged in at all in its first week.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A new account (in its first two weeks, still onboarding) that hasn't logged in at all.

playbooks.title: Day-30 onboarding health check
playbooks.problem: An onboarding account is past the first weeks but health is still low.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: An account still in onboarding whose health score is below 60.

playbooks.title: Long-tail onboarding
playbooks.problem: The account is 90+ days old but never finished onboarding.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Still in onboarding 85 or more days after signing up.

playbooks.title: Welcome — day 1
playbooks.problem: A brand-new account just came on board.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A brand-new account that signed up within the last 2 days.

playbooks.title: Graduated to growth
playbooks.problem: An account just moved from onboarding into active growth.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: An account that just moved from onboarding into active use with health trending up.

playbooks.title: Spend surging
playbooks.problem: Their rebilling spend is climbing fast — they're scaling.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: A healthy account whose rebilling spend is climbing fast (up 12% or more) — they're scaling.

playbooks.title: Plan upgraded — deepen
playbooks.problem: They recently upgraded to a higher plan.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: They upgraded to a higher plan in the last 30 days.

playbooks.title: Lifetime spend milestone
playbooks.problem: Their total spend with you has crossed a meaningful threshold.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Their total lifetime spend with you has crossed a meaningful threshold (around $30,000).

playbooks.title: High engagement on entry plan
playbooks.problem: They're using the product heavily while still on an entry plan.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: They're using the product heavily while still on an entry (Starter) plan.

playbooks.title: Power user emerged
playbooks.problem: Someone is in the product daily — a clear champion.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Someone is in the product daily on a healthy account — a clear champion.

playbooks.title: No feedback in 60+ days
playbooks.problem: An established account hasn't given any feedback in a long time.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: An established account that has never given any feedback.

playbooks.title: Health reached thriving
playbooks.problem: Their health just climbed into the thriving band.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: Their health just climbed into the thriving band.

playbooks.title: 1-year anniversary
playbooks.problem: An account is hitting its one-year mark with you.
playbooks.defaultTrigger: An account hitting its one-year mark with you (active 350 to 380 days).

state.label: Ran once
state.description: A historical run-once deployment (a variant of paused).

enums.stateNote: Playbook.state is the seed/default; the live per-agency deployment state is AutopilotStatus (off | on | paused | archived). 'archived' = soft-removed with history kept; 'ranonce' is a historical paused variant for run-once deployments.

recipes.label: At-risk & renewing soon
recipes.blurb: Shaky accounts with a renewal inside the next month.

recipes.label: Big accounts going downhill
recipes.blurb: Your biggest accounts whose health is falling.

recipes.label: Gone quiet
recipes.blurb: Owners who haven't logged in for 21+ days.

recipes.label: Quiet and not using Workflows
recipes.blurb: Gone quiet and never turned on Workflows.

recipes.label: Payment failed
recipes.blurb: A charge was declined or failed.

recipes.label: Slipping engagement
recipes.blurb: Feature use is falling and health is shaky.

recipesNote: Recipes seed the builder's empty state, name a phrasing example, and link to the downstream play. In Phase 1, any health.* criterion in a recipe's set is stripped before use (rec-atrisk-renewing, rec-big-downhill, rec-slipping-engagement keep only their HL-native parts).

attentionSignals.title: Payment failed on N sub-account(s)
attentionSignals.meaning: A charge was declined — these accounts can lose access until billing is fixed.

attentionSignals.title: N sub-account(s) haven't logged in for 14 days
attentionSignals.meaning: These owners have gone quiet — a leading sign of disengagement.

attentionSignals.title: N account(s) dropped to At-Risk
attentionSignals.meaning: Overall health just fell into the at-risk band — intervene before renewal.

attentionSignalsNote: Tier-1 (native) signals are always active; Tier-2 (health) signals appear only in Phase 2. Production will add more definitions; the model is fixed.

predicateHelpers.notOnboardingLive: Account is enabled and its lifecycle stage is neither onboarding nor churned.
predicateHelpers.stickyReverse: A sticky + reverse + setup Signal on the given subject(s), detected within the last 30 days (the strongest churn signal — a critical setup actively being lost).
predicateHelpers.hasFeature: The account has an adoption feature x with engagement greater than 0.
predicateHelpers.recentPlanChange: A plan change of the given type (upgrade/downgrade/reactivation/churn) within the given number of days.
predicateHelpers.failedAttempts: The count of payment attempts whose status is failed.
predicateHelpers.lifetimeSpendOf: The account's lifetime spend = MRR x max(1, activeDays / 30).
predicateHelpers.usageReverse: A reverse usage Signal on the given subject(s) within the given number of days.
predicateHelpers.underutilizedFeatures: The count of features the account has barely used (paid for but low engagement).
predicateHelpers.failedPayments: Live accounts where the last payment failed OR any payment attempt failed.
predicateHelpers.stalledOnboarding: Accounts where onboarding is stalled (days on current step exceed the step SLA) and the account is enabled.
predicateHelpers.renewsWithin: daysUntil(renewalDate) falls inside the given (min, max) day window.

filters.operatorSemantics: lt/gt/gte/lte/eq are numeric; between = value within [lo,hi]; is = boolean/string equality; isNot = string inequality; isAnyOf = set intersection non-empty over a CSV field; isNoneOf = set intersection empty; contains/startsWith = case-insensitive substring/prefix; inNext = 0<=days<=N; inLast = -N<=days<=0; moreThanAgo = days<-N; within = |days|<=N; falling = value<0; rising = value>0. Date N in days: weeks->Nx7, months->Nx30, else N. band operators are Phase-2 only. Operator labels are always plain words, never symbols (see filters.operatorLabels).

operatorLabels._agoNote: 'Ago' fields (engagement.lastLoginDays, user.idleDays) restate in past tense ('was more than ... ago').

simpleQuickAdd.label: Days since a user logged in

fields.label: Days since a user logged in
